languages.text: [Показать письмо Амеллы] "Посмотрите: из вашей жизни сделали выставку, и это один из экспонатов!"

traits.locale_text: [показать письмо Амеллы] из вашей жизни сделали выставку, вот экспонат!

languages.text: [Show Amella's letter] "Look: they made an exhibition out of your life, and this is one of the exhibits!"
languages.original_text: [Показать письмо Амеллы] "Посмотрите: из вашей жизни сделали выставку, и это один из экспонатов!"

traits.locale_text: [Show Amella's letter] "Look: they made an exhibition out of your life, and this is one of the exhibits!"
[Show Amella's letter] "Look: they made an exhibition out of your life, and this is one of the exhibits!"
[Show Amella's letter] "Look: they made an exhibition out of your life, and this is one of the exhibits!"

languages.text: 【出示阿梅拉的信】“你看，他们拿你的一生办了场展览，这就是其中一件展品！”
languages.original_text: [Show Amella's letter] "Look: they made an exhibition out of your life, and this is one of the exhibits!"

traits.locale_text: 【出示阿梅拉的信】“你看，他们拿你的一生办了场展览，这就是其中一件展品！”

languages.text: [Lui montrer la lettre d'Amella] « Voyez plutôt, on étale votre vie en place publique et ce document fait partie du spectacle ! »
languages.original_text: [Show Amella's letter] "Look: they made an exhibition out of your life, and this is one of the exhibits!"

traits.locale_text: [Lui montrer la lettre d'Amella] « Voyez plutôt, on étale votre vie en place publique et ce document fait partie du spectacle ! »

languages.text: [Amella'nın mektubunu göster] "Bak. Hayatını sergi yaptılar. Bu da bir parçası işte!"
languages.original_text: [Show Amella's letter] "Look: they made an exhibition out of your life, and this is one of the exhibits!"

traits.locale_text: [Amella'nın mektubunu göster] "Bak. Hayatını sergi yaptılar. Bu da bir parçası işte!"

languages.text: [Mostrarle la carta de Amella] «Mire, hicieron una exposición sobre su vida, ¡y este es uno de los objetos expuestos!».
languages.original_text: [Show Amella's letter] "Look: they made an exhibition out of your life, and this is one of the exhibits!"

traits.locale_text: [Mostrarle la carta de Amella] «Mire, hicieron una exposición sobre su vida, ¡y este es uno de los objetos expuestos!».

languages.text: [Amellas Brief zeigen] "Seht her: Sie widmen Eurem Leben eine Ausstellung, und dies ist eines der Exponate."
languages.original_text: [Show Amella's letter] "Look: they made an exhibition out of your life, and this is one of the exhibits!"

traits.locale_text: [Amellas Brief zeigen] "Seht her: Sie widmen Eurem Leben eine Ausstellung, und dies ist eines der Exponate."

languages.text: アメラの書いた手紙を見せる。「ほら、あなたの生活を展示にしたんだ。そして、これがその展示の一つだ！」
languages.original_text: [Show Amella's letter] "Look: they made an exhibition out of your life, and this is one of the exhibits!"

traits.locale_text: アメラの書いた手紙を見せる。「ほら、あなたの生活を展示にしたんだ。そして、これがその展示の一つだ！」
